_note: NOT a single backend endpoint. Composite assembled by backend_data_worker from accounts, goals, expected-incomes, debts, limits RPC calls. Fields marked GAP have no backend source.

_assembly_sources.hasDebt: any active debt with remaining_balance > 0 from GET /api/v1/debts?status=active
_assembly_sources.monthlyDebtPayment: SUM(monthly_payment) for active debts where monthly_payment is set
_assembly_sources.currentSavings: GAP — not stored; could use goals[].current_amount sum
